member.name: T:ChunkedTransaction
member.summary: A common base for file and topic message transactions.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.#ctor
member.summary: Constructor.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.#ctor(Proto.TransactionBody)
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: protobuf TransactionBody

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.#ctor(DictionaryLinked{TransactionId,DictionaryLinked{AccountId,Proto.Transaction}})
member.summary: Constructor.
member.param: Compound list of transaction id's list of (AccountId, Transaction) records
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.RequireNotFrozen
member.summary: Assign the Data via a byte string.
member.param: the byte string

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.RequireNotFrozen_2
member.summary: Assign the Data via a byte array.
member.param: the byte array

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.RequireNotFrozen_3
member.summary: Assign the Data via a string.
member.param: the byte array

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.RequireNotFrozen_4
member.summary: Maximum number of chunks this message will get broken up into when it's frozen.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.RequireNotFrozen_5
member.summary: Assign the chunk size.
member.param: the chunk size

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.GetAllTransactionHashesPerNode
member.summary: Extract the list of transaction hashes.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.BodySizeAllChunks
member.summary: Get the body sizes for all chunks in a FileAppendTransaction. For transactions with multiple chunks (like large file appends), this returns an array containing the size of each chunk's transaction body. The size is calculated by encoding the transaction body to protobuf format.
member.returns: List of integers that represent the size of each chunk

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.GetAllSignatures
member.summary: Extract the list of all signers.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ShouldGetReceipt
member.summary: Should the receipt be retrieved?
member.returns: by default do not get a receipt

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAll(Client)
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.returns: Result of execution for each chunk

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAll(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.returns: Result of execution for each chunk

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client)
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
member.returns: Future result of execution for each chunk

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan)
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
member.returns: Future result of execution for each chunk

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionResponse},System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionResponse},System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which handles the result or error.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionResponse}},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.ExecuteAllAsync(Client,System.TimeSpan,System.Action{System.Collections.Generic.IList{TransactionResponse}},System.Action{System.Exception})
member.summary: Execute this transaction or query asynchronously.
member.param: The client with which this will be executed.
The timeout after which the execution attempt will be cancelled.
a Action which consumes the result on success.
a Action which consumes the error on failure.

member.name: M:ChunkedTransaction.OnFreezeChunk(Proto.TransactionBody,Proto.TransactionID,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: A common base for file and topic message transactions.
